mapper.select:
select ac.id, ac.user_id, ac.account_name, ac.account_type, ac.balance, ac.remark, ac.status,
ui.name as userName, ui.images as userImages
from accounts ac left join user_info ui ON (ui.id = ac.user_id) where 1 = 1
AND ac.account_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.accountName},'%')
AND ac.account_type LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.accountType},'%')
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
order by ac.id desc
